description: The NOTICE/THIRD-PARTY file is hand-maintained and has drifted, so shipped components are missing required attribution.
body: Failure mode: attribution is kept in a hand-edited credits file that was last updated months ago, so newly added or upgraded dependencies ship without their required copyright and license text. Detection signals: regenerating attribution from the lockfile produces a large diff; components in the lockfile are absent from the NOTICE file; Apache-2.0 upstream NOTICE content was never propagated. Do not maintain attribution by hand or trust that it tracks the lockfile. Safer fallback: generate the NOTICE/THIRD-PARTY file mechanically from the resolved lockfile on every build and fail CI when the regenerated file differs from the committed one.
